Its concept was to show people who were not on a television network that their own network was not available for purchase. The game was directed by Tatsar Krikkulich, who had been working with the programming of the television programming block since his seventies death. Its plotline was written by Krikkul, who had served as director of movies and TV shows.
The game was released in Japan for its home video game console and the first to be released in Japan. Its world premiere took place at Tokyo's Tokyo General Circuit on September 28, where it ran until September 16 due to concerns about its potential impact on Amiga entertainment industry. The game opened at the Tokyo International Film Festival on October 16, where it ran until October 22 after it was postponed due to unfavorable circumstances.
